description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a collared shirt, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes. He wears a flat cap and sunglasses, giving him a modern, city-dweller appearance. The shirt is buttoned and untucked, and the pants are straight-cut, suitable for walking or commuting. His arms are extended horizontally, and his posture is upright and balanced. The shoes appear robust, designed for comfort and durability on city streets. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and his overall look is practical and stylish for an urban environment.
description: An adult male in casual urban clothing with a flat cap and sunglasses, standing upright with arms extended. He wears a collared shirt, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, sunglasses, flat cap, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the flat cap, sunglasses, and the straight cut of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and cap, with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face, cap, and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: collared button-up shirt, straight-cut pants, flat cap, sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
